title: A global regenerative network.
dek: Local chapters, builder guilds, and storytellers coordinating public goods, regenerative action, and onchain impact infrastructure.
promise: Greenpill helps local communities, builders, and storytellers coordinate regenerative action with shared learning, public proof, and web3-native tools.
summary: The public site should show Greenpill as a living network: chapters doing local work, guilds building tools and media, the Library carrying the knowledge commons, and the Garden giving newcomers a clear next step.

hero.title: A global regenerative network.
hero.dek: Chapters, guilds, and public-goods builders coordinating real-world impact.
hero.body: Start with the map, read the field notes, browse the public library, or enter through the Garden at the pace that fits.

sections.title: See the network as living infrastructure.
sections.dek: The map should combine chapter anchors with approved public nodes and public-safe aggregate state.
sections.body: Use chapter content as the canonical static source and the public agent routes for approved projections and fresh counts.

sections.title: Field notes from chapters and guilds.
sections.dek: Real updates from Greenpill Nigeria, Brasil, London Ontario, GreenSofa, the Garden, and the Dev Guild are seeded for editorial review.
sections.body: Story cards should appear here only after each story is steward-approved and marked published. Keep draft stories and unsupported HiFi stories out of the public launch path.

sections.title: A public knowledge commons.
sections.dek: Books, podcast conversations, public Hub threads, Dev Guild writing, and Garden materials should sit together instead of being scattered across tools.
sections.body: The Library should prioritize public, source-backed resources and avoid pretending draft guides or private docs are launch-ready public content.

sections.title: Builders, writers, and stewards ship the network.
sections.dek: The Dev Guild and Writers Guild should be visible pathways, with Green Goods linked through public proof and Dev Guild context for now.
sections.body: Use source-backed project pages and public links. Do not surface private member rosters or application state in the logged-out public site.

sections.title: Enter at the right level of commitment.
sections.dek: The Garden becomes the public onboarding ramp: subscribe, join the conversation, self-assess, then book a steward conversation when ready.
sections.body: Keep the public page illustrative and editorial. Real assessment answers, pledge state, and steward scheduling belong outside public Keystatic content.

seo.title: Greenpill Network
seo.description: Greenpill is a global regenerative network of chapters, guilds, storytellers, and builders coordinating public goods and onchain impact.
